eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Hyde, SD; at 9:29 AM on JUN 29, 2026 Effective until 2:29 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Hyde County Sheriff's Office.  A no travel advisory is issued for the City of Highmore. Hyde County Sheriff is requesting no travel in and around Highmore due to downed power lines and storm debris.
